data.title: Noble protocol to sunset Cosmos appchain, launch EVM-based Layer 1
data.description:
Noble is moving from Cosmos to a standalone EVM Layer 1, focusing on stablecoin applications, FX products, and broader DeFi integration with maintained IBC support.
source: https://catenaa.com/blockchain/noble-protocol-to-sunset-cosmos-appchain-launch-evm-based-layer-1/

data.title: Japan plans framework that could permit crypto ETFs by 2028: Nikkei
data.description:
Japan’s financial regulator is weighing rule changes that could allow crypto assets to qualify for ETFs, signaling a possible shift in retail access.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/japan-considers-crypto-etfs-2028-nikkei?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance: Airdrops will be available at 17:00, with a minimum requirement of 241 Alpha Points.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available at 17:00 (UTC+8) today. Users holding at least 241 Binance Alpha Credits are eligible to claim the tokens. It's on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is depleted or the event ends. Further details will be announced separately.

data.title: Santiment Highlights Investment Opportunities in Undervalued Cryptocurrencies
data.description:
On January 26, Santiment, a cryptocurrency market analysis firm, shared insights on social media regarding investment opportunities in cryptocurrencies with negative MVRV indicators. According to BlockBeats, when the MVRV ratio of a cryptocurrency is negative, it indicates that most ordinary traders are experiencing losses, presenting a potential entry point for investors. The more negative the yield, the lower the current buying risk for investors.

The MVRV indicators for major cryptocurrencies are currently as follows: ChainLink at -9.5%, Cardano at -7.9%, Ethereum at -7.6%, XRP at -5.7%, and Bitcoin at -3.7%, all suggesting undervaluation.

MVRV, which stands for Market Value to Realized Value Ratio, is commonly used to assess whether the average investor holding a particular cryptocurrency is profiting or losing money, and whether the market valuation is high or low.

data.title: The loan health ratio on Bhutan's sovereign wealth fund Aave has fallen below 1.2.
data.description: This morning, Ethereum briefly dipped below $2,800, and the loan health ratio of Druk Holdings' main wallet on Aave briefly fell below 1.2, currently standing at 1.22. From January 19th to 20th, an address associated with Druk Holdings leveraged its long position in ETH. As of press time, this address holds 116,560 stETH, representing a floating loss of approximately 10% from its purchase cost. All of this stETH is currently held in Aave, with the main wallet holding 104,000 stETH and a loan of 200 million USDT.

data.title: MetaPlanet Revises 2025 Fiscal Year Revenue Forecast
data.description: On January 26, MetaPlanet announced an upward revision of its 2025 fiscal year performance expectations. According to BlockBeats, the company projects its revenue to increase from 6.8 billion yen to 8.905 billion yen, with operating profit rising to 6.287 billion yen. However, due to the quarterly market value fluctuations of Bitcoin, MetaPlanet has recorded an evaluation loss of 104.636 billion yen, resulting in an ordinary loss of 98.558 billion yen.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Embraces Full User Self-Verification with ZK-SNARK Advances
data.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has shifted his stance from skepticism in 2017 to support for full user self-verification of blockchain state. According to NS3.AI, Buterin now sees this approach as feasible due to advancements in ZK-SNARK technology. He contends that recent cryptographic developments enable users to verify the correctness of the blockchain without needing to re-execute all transactions. This makes full self-validation a practical fallback option. The 'Mountain Man' strategy offers users significant resilience against network failures, centralization risks, and censorship, thereby maintaining Ethereum's decentralized principles.

data.title: A whale that lost $18.8 million in two weeks invested $36.04 million to buy 7,536 XAUT tokens and is currently showing a profit of $2.3 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale that lost $18.8 million in ETH trading over two weeks is now doubling down on gold purchases. Since December 13, 2025, the whale has spent $36.04 million to buy 7,536 XAUTs at an average price of $4,786, currently worth $38.34 million, representing a paper profit of $2.3 million.

data.description:
Matcha Meta disclosed a SwapNet security incident on Sunday and PeckShield estimated roughly $16. 8 million in crypto was drained.

data.title: Coinbase: Over 70% of institutional investors believe BTC is undervalued in the $85,000 to $95,000 range.
data.description: According to a Coinbase survey, over 70% of institutional investors believe Bitcoin is undervalued in its current price range of $85,000 to $95,000. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitget launches its "Million-Dollar Club" contract VIP program, with the first phase including limited-edition Moutai for the Year of the Horse.
data.description: Bitget has announced an upgrade to its contract VIP service system and launched the "Million Club" program. Eligible contract VIP users can receive a monthly premium physical gift box customized by the platform. The initial phase will be based on a snapshot of account data as of January 25, 2026, and will award a specific quantity of Feitian Moutai or a limited-edition Year of the Horse Moutai based on the user's contract trading volume over the past 30 days and their contract VIP level. The "Million Club" program will run from January to June 2026, and the gift boxes will include, but are not limited to, Moutai, physical gold, and Apple products. Specific benefits will be announced monthly. For more details, please visit the Bitget official platform.

data.title: South Korea to Launch Unit for Monitoring Crypto Tax Evasion
data.description: South Korea's National Tax Service (NTS) has announced plans to create a specialized unit aimed at addressing tax evasion in the virtual asset sector. According to NS3.AI, this new division will be responsible for managing all activities related to crypto tax evasion and will focus on developing systems to track and analyze transaction data. The initiative is part of the NTS's 2026 National Tax Administration Operation Plan, reflecting the country's commitment to enhancing oversight in the rapidly evolving digital asset landscape.

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses 2900 USDT Amid Daily Increase
data.description: Ethereum has risen above 2900 USDT, currently trading at 2900.24 USDT, marking a daily increase of 2.94%. According to Foresight News, this development was observed on Bitget's market data platform.

data.title: Global Crypto Sector Sees Over $222 Million in Funding Last Week
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that the global cryptocurrency sector witnessed 13 public funding events last week, with a total investment exceeding $222 million. The funding spanned various sectors including DeFi, Web3 combined with AI, infrastructure, and CeFi. Notable among these was Superstate Inc., which secured $82.5 million in a Series B round led by Bain Capital Crypto and Distributed Global. Additionally, Pomelo Latam raised $55 million in a Series C round, with Kaszek and Insight Partners as lead investors. Bitcoin payment startup ZBD Pay also announced the completion of a $40 million Series C funding round.

data.title: Sol Meme coin clawd surged over 110% intraday, pushing its market capitalization above $13 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the Solana chain's Meme coin, clawd, saw a daily increase of over 110%, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $13 million. It is currently trading at approximately $13.09 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: The total market capitalization of both tokenized gold and tokenized silver sectors reached new highs.
data.description: According to Coingecko data, as gold prices continue to rise, the total market capitalization of the tokenized gold sector has exceeded $5.27 billion, currently reaching $5,275,490,349, a 24-hour increase of 1%; the market capitalization of the tokenized silver sector has exceeded $400 million, currently reaching $439,598,206, a 24-hour increase of 4.5%, both reaching new highs.

data.title: Emergence of AI Operating Systems Highlights Decentralized Storage Potential
data.description:
Jack Kong, CEO of Nano Labs, posted on X about the emerging prototype of AI operating systems. A new system, built using Clawdbot, integrates multiple models with a command-line interface, skills, and a local management interface. It connects with platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, iMessage, and Slack, offering features such as voice recognition, multi-layer memory, calendar management, email processing, scheduled tasks, and programming capabilities, making it accessible even to non-programmers.

Kong draws parallels between this architecture and the evolution of Web3 infrastructure. He suggests that as AI begins to integrate data streams across multiple platforms, the importance of decentralized storage and computing will become increasingly evident.
